query:
UPDATE games 
SET 
  awayBookSpread = '-1.5',
  homeBookSpread = '1.5'
WHERE sport = 'NHL' 
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-15'
  AND awayTeam LIKE '%blues%'
  AND homeTeam LIKE '%jets%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
UPDATE games 
SET 
  awayBookSpread = '-1.5',
  homeBookSpread = '1.5'
WHERE sport = 'NHL' 
  AND gameDate = '2026-03-15'
  AND awayTeam LIKE '%blues%'
  AND homeTeam LIKE '%jets%';
